summary: Labour Minister Mansukh Mandaviya said the EPFO has processed interest on provident funds of 34 crore members for FY26. Interest earned on EPF contributions is tax-exempt up to ₹1.5 lakh under Section 80C under the old tax regime.

title: RBI fixes SGB 2019-20 Series II redemption price at ₹14,199. Should investors redeem now?
